title: Product proof: arbitrary source bundle → synthesis packet → benchmark → Atlas preview artifact
problem: Tickets 361–380 closed docs/wiring for arbitrary-source proof bundle and synthesis packet benchmark, but no single mock-first product proof shows the researcher end-to-end: staged arbitrary-source bundle → grounded synthesis packet → benchmark throughput → Atlas/public preview visibility with a traceable operator artifact.
acceptance_criteria: Mock-first operator proof runs prove-arbitrary-source-bundle (or equivalent staged mock spine) on temp paths and records source_count, claim_count, and evidence_count in a traceable gitignored artifact.
Proof chains synthesize --packet on the grounded fixture packet (mock_cloud) and records synthesis_output_path without writing model output to accepted graph tables.
Proof runs synthesis packet benchmark dry-run and records reports_per_hour_estimate in the same artifact or linked gitignored summary.
Safety audit status (pass/fail + scan scope) is recorded in the artifact; no public export policy widening.
Atlas/public preview visibility is demonstrated (private atlas snapshot coherence and/or committed public-site atlas-preview fixture path referenced in artifact).
Live OpenAI remains opt-in only; default proof path uses mock LLM / mock_cloud.
Human-readable agent report with GO/PARTIAL/NO-GO product verdict and artifact paths.
Golden + full pytest + safety audit pass; public-site build when preview visibility is in scope.
non_goals: Model output writing directly to accepted DB tables.
rollback_plan: Revert proof script/module and agent report; leave prior docs cross-links intact.
